admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Does not encode support class, center action, or Delta L.
admissibilities.name: vacuum_undefined_association_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: An undefined vacuum point has no active rank-3 association record until first association reaches it.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Creates scalar-sign conjugate branches but does not prescribe path shortening or lengthening.
admissibilities.name: vacuum_split_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: First association to an undefined vacuum point resolves it into two scalar branches with equal and opposite scalar values.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Specifies branch-slot accounting only; it does not choose a topology transaction.
admissibilities.name: six_slot_split_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: Each resolved branch carries three association slots, so one split vacuum site contributes six pending branch association slots.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Selection is based on scalar-gradient burden, not same/opposite labels or target outcomes.
admissibilities.name: association_gradient_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: Among available association candidates, the admitted new association is the one minimizing scalar-gradient burden.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Latency prevents instantaneous spreading from serving as an uninspected path edit.
admissibilities.name: one_cycle_association_latency
admissibilities.statement: New association formation is not instantaneous; proposals made in one cycle become usable associations in the next cycle.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: This admits or rejects path-carrier status from gradient determinacy, not from theorem labels.
admissibilities.name: relational_gradient_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: A relational path point carries relationship only when it participates in a determinate scalar gradient.

admissibilities.anti_imposition_note: Invalidity is a carrier-status condition; it does not by itself specify insertion or removal.
admissibilities.name: center_invalidity_admissibility
admissibilities.statement: No-gradient centers and ambiguous-gradient centers cannot persist as relational path carriers.

certification_rule: Only A1-A7 are admissibility candidates in this package. Accommodation items H1-H5 are proof obligations, not primitive rules.
